Package index

Data Loading & Preparation

Load built-in datasets and prepare data for analysis

load_crop_data()
Load a crop dataset
validate_input_data()
Validate input data for CERIS analysis
prepare_trait_data()
Prepare trait data for analysis
compute_env_means()
Compute environmental means
prepare_line_by_env()
Prepare line-by-environment matrix
compile_envirome()
Compile Daily Environmental Data into a Single Matrix
fetch_nasa_power()
Fetch Environmental Data from NASA POWER and Compute CERIS Parameters
prepare_genotype()
Prepare genotype matrix for genomic prediction

CERIS Search

Exhaustive search for critical environmental windows

run_CERIS()
CERIS Exhaustive Search for Critical Environmental Windows
ceris_loo_cor()
Leave-One-Out Cross-Validated Correlation
ceris_identify_best()
Identify the Best Environmental Window from CERIS Results
compute_window_params()
Compute environmental covariate values for a window

Slope-Intercept

Reaction norm parameter estimation

slope_intercept()
Calculate Reaction Norm Slopes and Intercepts

Joint Regression Analysis

Finlay-Wilkinson regression across environments

jra_model()
Joint Regression Analysis

Cross-Validation

Leave-one-out and K-fold cross-validation methods

cv_env()
Leave-One-Environment-Out Cross-Validation (1-to-2)
cv_genotype()
K-Fold Genotype Cross-Validation (1-to-3)
cv_combined()
Combined Environment and Genotype Cross-Validation (1-to-4)
loocv()
Line-Level Leave-One-Out Cross-Validation

Genomic Prediction (JGRA)

Joint Genomic Regression Analysis and forecasting

jgra()
Joint Genomic Regression Analysis (Reaction Norm Parameters)
jgra_marker()
Joint Genomic Regression Analysis (Marker Effects)
pred_rrblup()
Genomic Prediction using rrBLUP
pred_bayesb()
Genomic Prediction using BayesB (BGLR)
forecast_next_year()
Forecast Phenotypes for New Environments

Visualization

Plotting functions for CERIS results

plot_ceris_heatmap()
Plot CERIS Correlation Heatmap
plot_clustering_heatmap()
Clustering Heatmap of Environmental Parameters
plot_cv_results()
Plot Cross-Validation Results
plot_env_factors()
Plot Environmental Factors Over Time
plot_env_means()
Plot Phenotypes vs Environmental Means
plot_geo_order()
Plot Environments in Geographic Order
plot_jra()
Plot JRA Results
plot_pairwise_dist()
Plot Pairwise Trait Distributions
plot_pca_biplot()
PCA Biplot of Environmental Parameters
plot_prediction_result()
Plot LOOCV/Forecast Prediction Results
plot_reaction_norm()
Plot Reaction Norms
plot_slope_intercept()
Plot Reaction Norm Slopes and Intercepts
plot_trait_env_param()
Plot Trait Mean vs Environmental Parameter

Color Palettes

Color utilities for CERIS plots

ceris_diverge_palette()
CERIS diverging color palette for correlation heatmaps
ceris_env_palette()
Environment color palette

Shiny Application

Interactive analysis interface

run_app()
Launch the CERIS Shiny Application

Datasets

Built-in crop datasets for examples and tutorials

crop_info
Crop information summary
sorghum_env_meta
Sorghum environment metadata
sorghum_env_params
Sorghum daily environmental parameters
sorghum_genotype
Sorghum SNP genotype matrix
sorghum_traits
Sorghum phenotypic trait records
maize_env_meta
Maize environment metadata
maize_env_params
Maize daily environmental parameters
maize_genotype
Maize SNP genotype matrix
maize_traits
Maize phenotypic trait records
rice_env_meta
Rice environment metadata
rice_env_params
Rice daily environmental parameters
rice_genotype
Rice SNP genotype matrix
rice_traits
Rice phenotypic trait records
oat_env_meta
Oat environment metadata
oat_env_params
Oat daily environmental parameters
oat_traits
Oat phenotypic trait records
